scripts.e2e:detox:build:ios: npm run e2e:patch:ios && detox build -c ios.sim.debug
scripts.e2e:detox:prepare:ios: npm run e2e:prebuild:ios && npm run e2e:detox:build:ios
scripts.e2e:detox:test:ios: (command -v applesimutils >/dev/null 2>&1 || (echo "Missing applesimutils. Install with: brew tap wix/brew && brew install applesimutils" && exit 1)) && detox test -c ios.sim.debug
scripts.e2e:detox:visual:ios: npm run e2e:detox:prepare:ios && (command -v applesimutils >/dev/null 2>&1 || (echo "Missing applesimutils. Install with: brew tap wix/brew && brew install applesimutils" && exit 1)) && detox test -c ios.sim.debug e2e/visual-states.e2e.js --take-screenshots all
scripts.e2e:detox:visual:edge:ios: npm run e2e:detox:prepare:ios && (command -v applesimutils >/dev/null 2>&1 || (echo "Missing applesimutils. Install with: brew tap wix/brew && brew install applesimutils" && exit 1)) && detox test -c ios.sim.debug e2e/visual-edge-states.e2e.js --take-screenshots all
scripts.e2e:detox:ios: npm run e2e:prebuild:ios && npm run e2e:detox:build:ios && npm run e2e:detox:test:ios
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test:coverage
